summary: Testing iteration 15 - NEW Character Sheet Full feature with tabbed interface tested. All 24 frontend tests pass (tab navigation, ability scores/skills display, spells tab with SRD integration, features/feats tab, edit mode, back navigation). All 31 backend tests pass (18 SRD API + 13 Character API CRUD).

frontend_tests.character-sheet-full.spec.ts: 24 passed - NEW Character Sheet feature fully tested

seed_data_creation: Created test character TEST_Elara_Wizard (ID: 5c200c1f-d584-4b3d-a3a2-e1b49b404e8d) - Level 5 Elf Wizard with INT 18, spellcasting ability set, and skill proficiencies (arcana, history, investigation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Character Sheet Full feature fully tested. Test character ID: 5c200c1f-d584-4b3d-a3a2-e1b49b404e8d (TEST_Elara_Wizard). Character sheet has 6 tabs: Overview (tab-overview), Abilities & Skills (tab-abilities), Spells (tab-spells), Features & Feats (tab-features), Equipment (tab-equipment), Notes & Bio (tab-notes). Key data-testids: character-sheet-full, ability-{key}, skill-{name}, spell-{name}, feature-{name}, spell-search, spell-level-filter, edit-btn, save-btn, cancel-edit-btn, back-btn, hp-display, ac-display, initiative-display, speed-display, prof-display.

character_sheet_tab_navigation.description: All 6 tabs (Overview, Abilities & Skills, Spells, Features & Feats, Equipment, Notes & Bio) are navigable with correct content loading

character_sheet_ability_scores.description: All 6 ability scores displayed with correct modifiers and saving throw proficiency indicators. Skills section shows proficiency status with correct bonuses.

character_sheet_spells_tab.description: Spells tab shows spellcasting stats (ability, save DC, attack bonus), class-specific spells from SRD, search functionality, level filter, and expandable spell details

character_sheet_features_tab.description: Features tab shows class features from SRD based on character level, racial traits section, and feats section

character_sheet_edit_mode.description: Edit mode toggles correctly showing Save/Cancel buttons, editable ability score inputs, skill proficiency toggles, and HP fields

character_api_crud.description: Character CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) working correctly with auto-calculation of HP, proficiency bonus, and AC

srd_api_integration.description: SRD API endpoints for spells, classes, races, feats all working correctly with filtering capabilities
